section_plan.title: User Experience
section_plan.focus: Cover user interactions in the app, including browsing, ordering, and checkout.

section_plan.title: Order Management
section_plan.focus: Detail the store manager's workflow for managing incoming orders and updating statuses.

section_plan.title: Payment Processing
section_plan.focus: Explain the integration with the payment gateway for secure transaction handling.

section_plan.title: Data Management
section_plan.focus: Outline the data requirements for products, orders, and user information.

section_plan.title: System Integrations
section_plan.focus: Describe integration points with inventory management and user authentication services.

section_plan.title: Security Measures
section_plan.focus: Highlight security protocols for payment processing and user authentication.

sections.User Experience:
flowchart TD
    A[User Opens App] --> B[Browse Product Catalog]
    B --> C[Select Items]
    C --> D[Add to Shopping Cart]
    D --> E[Select Delivery Time Slot]
    E --> F[Proceed to Payment]
    F --> G[Confirm Order]
sections.Order Management:
flowchart TD
    A[Log into Admin Panel] --> B[View Incoming Orders]
    B --> C[Update Order Status]
    C --> D[Indicate Out-of-Stock Items]
    D --> E[Confirm Changes]
sections.Payment Processing:
flowchart TD
    A[User Proceeds to Payment] --> B[Send Payment Info]
    B --> C[Connect to Payment Gateway]
    C --> D[Process Payment]
    D --> E[Verify Payment Status]
    E --> F[Confirm Order]
sections.System Integrations:
flowchart TD
    A[Mobile Application] --> B[Payment Gateway]
    A --> C[Inventory Management System]
    A --> D[User Authentication Service]
    B --> E[Process Payments]
    C --> F[Update Stock Levels]
    D --> G[Authenticate Users]
sections.Security Measures:
flowchart TD
    A[User Authentication] --> B[OTP Verification]
    A --> C[Secure User Data]
    D[Payment Processing] --> E[Encrypt Payment Info]
    D --> F[Verify Payment Security]
    B --> G[Access Granted]
    C --> H[Data Protection]
